creator: william88@gmail.com
text:
On Wed, Mar 6, 2013 at 4:41 AM, Frederic Culot <culot@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi William,
>
> I am about to commit your patch, thanks for submitting it!
> I only have one concern regarding rhodecode-api: why did you remove it
> from the plist? It seems to me it is definitely needed as shown by the
> following tinderbox log extract:
>
> === Checking filesystem state
> list of extra files and directories in / (not present before this port was installed but present after it was deinstalled)
> 760898        4 -rwxr-xr-x    1 root             wheel                 328 Mar  6 06:25 usr/local/bin/rhodecode-api
>
> Do you agree it is still needed?

I do. Sorry about that, I was not using redports the time I made this port.
The following patch add it back.

Thank you.


-- 
William Grzybowski
